compiled_state.title: RED eval — Add eval test cases for config-based approach resolution routing
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
Establish GREEN baseline by running run-skill-evals.sh. Then add 4 promptfoo eval test cases to plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml:
(a) Standalone invocation, config=autonomous -> instructs dispatching decision-maker without user prompt
(b) Standalone invocation, config=interactive -> instructs displaying proposals to user, NOT dispatching agent
(c) Standalone invocation, config absent (empty) -> instructs dispatching decision-maker (default autonomous fallback)
(d) Either mode, after 2 counter-proposal cycles with no selection -> instructs escalating to user (escape hatch preserved regardless of mode)
All 4 FAIL (RED) against current SKILL.md (routes by caller context, not config).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] 4 eval cases present
  Verify: grep -c 'approach_resolution' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] RED marker in .test-index
  Verify: grep -q '\[test-approach-resolution-eval\]' .test-index
- [ ] Marker name matches eval config
  Verify: grep -q 'approach-resolution' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
